# Project Configuration

<!-- Auto-generated by /ccfold. Manual edits are preserved on re-fold. -->

## Platform
- **Host:** GitHub
- **CLI:** gh
- **Remote:** git@github.com:Wave-Engineering/squawkie-talkie.git

## Branching
- **Default branch:** main
- **Merge strategy:** squash
- **Protection:** `main` is guarded by classic branch protection — required checks are `test`, `e2e`, `docker`; `strict` is on (a PR must be up to date with `main` before it can merge). There is **no merge queue**; `gh pr merge --squash` merges directly once the checks are green.

## Status Mechanism
- **Type:** GitHub-native (issue open/closed state)
- **Agent instruction:** Track progress via issue state — `gh issue close <N>` on merge (PRs auto-close linked issues via `Closes #N`). No `status::*` label group exists on this repo; the `group::value` taxonomy below is for classification, not status.

## Existing Labels
<!-- Labels in use on this repo — do not conflict -->
`group::value` taxonomy (mutually exclusive within a group) plus the default GitHub set:
- **type::** — plan · feature · chore · docs
- **priority::** — high · medium
- **urgency::** — soon · normal
- **size::** — S · M · L
- Default GitHub: bug, documentation, duplicate, enhancement, good first issue, help wanted, invalid, question, wontfix

## Toolchain
- **Validation:** `bun run typecheck` (`tsc --noEmit`)
- **Tests:** `bun test` (unit + happy-dom DOM) · `bun run test:e2e` (Playwright, chromium)
- **Build:** `bun run build` (bundles client → `public/dist/app.js`)
- **Lint:** none discovered (no eslint/prettier/biome config)
- **Runtime:** Bun 1.3.x (CI pins `1.3.11`)

## CI
- **System:** GitHub Actions
- **Config:** `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- **Jobs:** `test` (typecheck + `bun test`) · `e2e` (Playwright chromium) · `docker` (build image + `scripts/ci/docker-smoke.sh`)
- **Triggers:** `push` to `main`, `pull_request`

<!-- End auto-generated -->
